name: Patrica
oneLineVibe: nice, but loves to talk (wine mom energy)

publicTasks: Talk to at least 2 characters (besides the player) and spread rumors.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: Being told she’s annoying directly or being confronted with truth that breaks her viewpoint.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHerFold: Direct blunt rejection or being called out in a way she can’t spin.

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: More gossip and drama (implicitly to spread more lies).
goals.mayorGoalForThem: Talk to as few characters as possible.

notes: Leonard listens to her, which she loves.
She clashes with Olaf because he shuts down her gossip.

secrets.spicySafeSecret: She knows a random character’s spicy secret (not Julio’s).

rumorBehavior.notes: Frequently retells only part of the story and adds her own spin.

catchphrasesOrTicks: Well you know how it is…
